title: selaginella radicata
intro: Selaginella radicata, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, among others. Selaginella radicata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
